chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-2051 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on contempt application. 16.12.2025. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant Advocate General, Sindh = None present for the petitioner. Same was the position on last date of hearing. This contempt application is pending since 2024 and no body is bothered to put appearance on behalf of the petitioner to assist this Court. The matter has already been disposed of vide order dated 27.08.2018, with the following terms:- “Per petitioner's version, the petitioner has already moved an 'application' dated 22.07.2015 before the Deputy Commissioner, Badin for 'construction of Katcha Road into Pacca Road' but since, 22.07.2015 no any order has been passed on the said application [Annexure-C/1 at page 35 of MoP]. Petitioner, nevertheless, states that he will be satisfied and shall not press the instant petition if, the Respondent No.3, is directed to dispose of the application of the petitioner dated 22.07.2015 in accordance with the law, however, after affording opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and Respondents/all concerned, to which the learned A.A.G also raised his 'no objection'. In view of the above, the instant petition stands 'disposed of in the above terms alongwith all pending application(s).” In view of above, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss this contempt application in default as prima facie the petitioner has no interest to pursue the same diligently. Accordingly, application MA No. 4702 of 2024 is dismissed in default. JUDGE JUDGE
